productDisplayName: Franco Leone Men Formal Black Formal Shoes
description: Cast a timeless impression with this pair of pointed toe franco leone leather shoes. Give your formal wear a twist of fashion with this designer leather shoe and revel in the comfort of easy fashion.UpperLeather upper with a diamond-textured design for absolute comfort and styleLace-up system for a snug, customised FitPointed toe design for absolute styleSuede inner lining for sweat-free all-day comfortMidsoleLeather footbed for all-day comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with palm frond grooves on the forefoot for grip on smooth surfacesTPR raised heel textured at the back foot region for absolute ergonomic comfortshoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shineDo not store in direct sunlight
